Markings locked: The same trainer remains the main on-screen subject in every clip. Depth layers: foreground texture, mid-ground action plane, background atmosphere with readable vertical framing. Weather, particulates, and set dressing remain coherent across the full 10 seconds. LIGHTING BLOCK: natural motivated available light with soft contrast. Practical sources motivate shadows; rim light separates subject from background; no random exposure shifts or white-balance drift between seconds. CAMERA BLOCK: handheld-inspired stability with observational framing. Framing: subject occupies lower two-thirds with headroom for Shorts safe zone. Depth of field: subject sharp, background softly separated. Camera movement must feel motivated and continuous — no unmotivated whip pans. MOTION BLOCK: Seconds 0–2 establish micro-movement and continuity read; seconds 2–7 execute the primary motivated action without hard cuts; seconds 7–10 decelerate into a stable end pose for Use Frame handoff. Motion direction flows forward through the scene — no reverse blocking. ATMOSPHERE BLOCK: Mood arc — fear converting into forward motion. Palette: neutral documentary color grade with selective warmth. Air density, haze, and environmental motion reinforce stakes without obscuring the subject. VISUAL DETAIL BLOCK: Material fidelity on skin, fabric, and surfaces. Hook detail: Hands preparing the key ingredient that defines Dog Training like pro.. Conflict pressure: Can this Dog Training method deliver the intended result on the first try?. Stakes if unresolved: If the central question fails, Can this Dog Training method deliver the intended result on the first try? — viewer must feel the cost immediately.. Textures readable at mobile resolution; no mushy CGI plastic skin.
